title: SATB
description: Add bars for saturation, exhaustion, and armor toughness!
body:
## ⭐ Description Inspired by [AppleSkin Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), **This datapack adds saturation, exhaustion, and armor toughness bars to the game!** You can fully customize what bars to display in the settings menu (see commands section). ⚠️ **DON'T FORGET TO DOWNLOAD THE RESOURCEPACK!** Modrinth doesn't make a good job showing it. Go to the versions page, click on the version you want to download and you will find the resourcepack download there. ## ℹ️ Bars Info: **Saturation Bar**: It shows how much food is left before the player's food starts to decay. It is like a secondary hunger bar. **Exhaustion Bar**: Shows how long it takes for the food bar or saturation to decrease by one. **Armor Toughness Bar**: Explaining armor toughness is a bit complicated, but basically is an extra resistence. You can see more information in the [wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Armor). ## 🪄 Commands: `/trigger satb_settings` - Opens the personal settings menu, where you can activate or deactivate the bar display individually for yourself. `/function satb:global_settings` - Opens the operator settings. Can enable and disable global settings (force settings for everyone). `/function satb:uninstall` - Remove all scoreboards and data used by the datapack from the world #
About the Resourcepack This datapack _requires_ a resourcepack to work. **All players** that are playing must have the resourcepack installed. If you are running on a dedicated server, you can configure it to force the use of resourcepack. What the resourcepack changes: - Add new fonts to the game. - Add new translations for EN_US and PT_BR languages (for the chatmenu) Players not using the resource pack won't see the bars.
--- _Needs assistance or report some bug? Please contact me! I'm active on Discord: nodenotjs_
